# PERF-016 positive: bytes.Buffer allocated inside loop
lang: go
file: PERF-016-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"fmt"
)

func RenderAll(values []int) []string {
	out := make([]string, 0, len(values))
	for _, v := range values {
		buf := bytes.Buffer{}
		fmt.Fprintf(&buf, "v=%d", v)
		out = append(out, buf.String())
	}
	return out
}
